case_title: ROBERT ANTHONY EVANS III VS. LOGAN BRETTANY STENFTENAGEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ROBERT ANTHONY EVANS III IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOGAN BRETTANY STENFTENAGEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-09-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT NOTIFIED COURT OF ILLNESS AND WAS ALLOWED A SHORT CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOTIFIED AND AGREED UPON CONTINUANCE DATE SELECTED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ROBERT ANTHONY EVANS. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT LOGAN BRETTANY STENFTENAGEL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS III, ROBERT ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STENFTENAGEL, LOGAN BRETTANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 SERVED MAR-22-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STENFTENAGEL, LOGAN BRETTANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,021.92 FILED BY EVANS III, ROBERT ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT STENFTENAGEL, LOGAN BRETTANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
